name: Rectangle Area Calculator
desc: Calculate the area, perimeter and diagonal of a rectangle.
seo_description: Use our free rectangle area calculator to quickly estimate area_m2, perimetro_m based on length, width. Not registration needed.
result_context: The area_m² ({area_m2}) is the total surface for materials like flooring; perimeter ({perimetro_m}) helps estimate baseboards; diagonal ({diagonal_m}) verifi is square corners.
formula_display: Area = Largo × Ancho | Perimeter = 2 × (Largo + Ancho) | Diagonal = √(Largo² + Ancho²)
steps: {'step': 4, 'description': 'Results: 37.19 m² area, 26 m perimeter, 9.74 m diagonal'}
mistakes: Mixing different units (and.g., meters and centimeters) without conversion
Using diagonal formula incorrectly by not squaring both sid is first
Forgetting to add waste factor when ordering materials based on area
rc: If {a} corresponds to {b}, then {c} corresponds to {x}.
fd: X = (B × C) ÷ A (direct) or X = (A × B) ÷ C (inverse)
el: If 5 kg costs 15€, how much do is 8 kg cost?
